titleStmt.title: SII 15.155: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 155. (B.K. No. 264 of 1927-28.) MAṄKAṆI, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the Śiva temple called dēgula.

The record is dated Śaka 1128, Krōdhana, amāvāse, Monday, solar eclipse. The name of the month is lost. The only solar eclipse in that year occurred in Phālguna, which corresponded to 1206 A.D., March 11, the weekday being Saturday. The Śaka year cited was current.

It registers gifts of land to the gods Lakshmīnarasiṁha, Sādēvēśvara and Śrīdharavāsudēva in the triple-shrined temple constructed at Maṅkaṇi by Kēśava, brother of Sahadēva-daṇḍanātha, who was governing the province of Tardavāḍi Thousand. These brothers belonged to the Vatsa-gōtra and Sahavāsi family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ bhāya śaṁbhavē . kaṁda . dēśādhīśvaranenisidanā sā-©
dēvanamajāta kēśevadēvaṁ lēsāgire maṁkaṇiyoḷ bhāskaradēva trikūṭamaṁ nirmmisidaṁ . piridāgi narapidainūrvarigittaṁ bhūmidānamaṁ śrīmārkaṁḍēyapuramideṁ
de māḍisidarasaṁ sādēvaneṁdaḍārpogaḷaridaṁ . śāsanavāgire pēḷvudu śāsanavaṁ barevudaṁte sāsanavāgal sāsanapaddhati likhitaṁ śāsanakādaṁbariye vāmanaracitaṁ .
© dēva śrīmāṁnu varāhō vassaṁpadēstu dharādhaṭha[ḥ .*] yadrōmavivarēṁbōdhi rālavālōdavadbhabhau . puravarṇnana dēvatāvarṇnana . © purama-©
dhyadalli lakṣmīnarasiṁgaṁ nalasi niṁdanene peṁpiṁgā puradoḷpiṁgāva puraṁ sari mārkaṁḍēya purakke dharaṇītaḷadoḷu . kuladaivaviṣṭadaivaṁ celuvaṁ
lakṣmīnṛsiṁhaneṁdeṁdolaviṁ kali taṁmma kēśavārkaṁ chalisalu tāṁ supratiṣṭhitaṁ māḍi sidaṁ . sādēvēśvaramaṁ śrī siridharavāsudēvaraṁ mā
ḍisidaṁ śrīsiṣṭabheṭṭatenayaṁ śrī sōvaladēviyaṇuga kēśavadēvan kṣētrādhipa caṁḍi keyuṁ mātrakeyarṇnaṁdikēśanā gaṇapatiyuṁ mitra
nemivaroldīge suputraṁ kuladīpa kēśavaṁgabhimatamaṁ . saresakavihridayasarasija divākara gōtramitraciṁtāmaṇi bhāsurakīrtti kēśavagā sa
rasati śaṇmukharumīge bēḍida baravaṁ . samudramadara dvīpa kṣētraviśayavarṇnana © vritta . yelavokkaliṁde bīsuttuṁ tuṟugida noreviṁ ḍiṁbhaḍaṁgādu
dudyacaḷadā bhakkubhakkuṁbhina samakarakarakṣōbhapāṭhīna puṁghōccaḷitadugrāvakra mālōḷanataraḷitekutukīḷakallōḷamāḷākuḷalōḷābhīḷakōḷāhaḷa baha
ḷaghanadhvānamaṁbhōnidhānaṁ . vri . saradhibyāvritaveḷayoḷu nelase jaṁbūdvīpavatyaṁta bhāsura vākṣētradamadhyadalli sogarakkuṁbāṁ baraniḷdamaṁdaravā maṁ
daradakṣiṇasthabharatekṣētraṁ jagaṁ nētrabhāsuravā kṣētramukhake lōcanamenalu kaṁgoppu guṁ kuṁtaḷa . kaṁda . kuṁtaḷaviśayada kāṁteya kuṁtaḷadaṁtaseva tadda �ḍi
ge mukhavippaṁtippa celva maṁkaṇiyaṁtadaṟoḷu niṁdanosedu lakṣmīnu siṁganu . © . rājāvaḷīvarṇnana . vritta . yidanānaṁdeda pāḷisuttavadaṭiṁdirddurnnatārātisaṁ
mmadakēḷīniḷayaṁ virōdhiviḷayaṁ dharmmātmajātōpamaṁ yaduvaṁśaprabhavaṁ jayapravi bhavaṁ bhūripratāpōdayaṁ madavaddōrbaḷacakravarttijayalakṣmīvallabha bhillamaṁ .
Ātana tanayaṁ nayanidhi vītabhayaṁ vīravairirāyajhaḷappaṁ bhūtaḷadoḷ negaḷdaṁ mmāṁ dhātōpamacaritenenisi jaītugidēva . vri . trijagādhīsanenippa jai
tanripaputraṁ siṁgabhūpāḷakaṁ bhujadōrddarppadoḷaṁga koṁga magadharnnēpāḷapāri yātraraṁ sajitaṁ rāṇiyavāsamaṁ sakaḷadēśakōśamaṁ koṁḍa rājajasaṁ
percire pāḷipaṁ prajegaḷaṁ rāyēbhakaṁṭhīravanu . vritta . Adaṭiṁḍāṁta virōdhimaṁḍaḷi karaṁ sāmaṁtaraṁ rāyaraṁ kadanōdyōgadoḷeyda saṁharisiye niḥkaṁṭakaṁmmāḍidaṁ
viditaṁ sarbadharitriyaṁ nijabhujāvaṣṭaṁbhadiṁ tāḷdidaṁ yaduvaṁśōrjjitalakṣmiyaṁ bhavanadoḷ vikrāṁtadiṁ siṁhaṇanu . kaṁda . Ā nripapādāṁbujasēvānipuṇaṁ hri
dyamaṁtravidyākaḷitaṁ mānanidhānaṁ siriyādhānaṁ sahadēvadaṁḍanāthaṁ negaḷdaṁ . © . tadanvayāvatārameṁteṁdaḍe © . kaṁda . cārucaritraṁ lakṣmīdhāmaṁ
nayavinayamēru kalpamahījaṁ nārāyaṇabhaṭṭaṁ śrī nārāyaṇacaritanenisi peṁpaṁ taḷedaṁ . Ātana viśuddhaguṇaṁ saṁbhūtātmana janmabhūmi kāśmīramenalu khyātaṁ sahavāsā
nvaya vāchasyagōtramēṁ pavitramō jagadoḷ . Ā vibhuvina tanayaṁ vidvavibhavaṁ bai śvanāthabhaṭṭaṁ viśvōrvvīvinutaṁ visadayaśaśrīvanitādīśananisi peṁpaṁ taḷedaṁ .
yena negaḷda bessibhaṭṭana tanayaṁ vikhyātakīrttiyamaḷa caritra jananuta śrīdharabhaṭṭaṁ vinayāṁ bōdhi siṣṭabhaṭṭa daṁḍādhīśaru . Avaroḷage . vritta . vinuta srīdharanā
yakaṁgavesavā lakṣmāṁbikādēvigaṁ taneyaṁ śaṁbhugavadrijātege magaṁ skaṁdaṁ biḍō jaṁgevaṁgana pauḷōmigavā jayaṁtanadhikaprakhyātanādaṁtirādaniḷāvallabhadaṁḍa
nātha sahadēvaṁ dhriṣṭadarpāpahaṁ . siddhavaralakṣmībhuvanaje vuddhata maiḷāramāḷabāṁ bhōrāsi sidha sahadēvaṁgabhivriddhiyamaṁ kāriyasiddhiyaṁ sale koṭṭaru . vri . khaṁḍeya
rāyaneṁba birudaṁ nripāḷaka siṁhaṇaṁge mārkkoṁḍarirāyamaṁḍaḷikara bedaṟaṭṭu taguḷdu gelva bhēruṁḍaparākramaṁge sahadēvacamūpatigeṁtu gaṁḍinoḷu toṁḍanidircci bāḷvadaṭanā
rggaḷa maiḷugiyaṁkakāranoḷu . vri . māḷava bhīmanarjjunaneppavanaṁ chalikoṁḍu barppa nābhīḷanenippa puṁḍarananōḍisi durggamanaīdi mutti kāḷānaḷanaṁte taghisuvanō vele siṁha
ṇanaṁkakāṟakāḷōpama siṁdaneṁdagidu lakhmeyanaggidanājiraṁgadoḷ . māṟāṁparāru dhuradoḷu mūṟuṁ ripurāyakuvaraheṁḍatigaṁḍaṁ sēṟisidaṁ sādēvaṁ nīṟaṁ siṁgaṇa kumāraniṁtī bi
rudaṁ . birudetti pogaḷipa rāyara nāyakaśiredalle nāyakaride nōvaranenisi rāya siṁgaṇanaramaga sahadēvadaṁḍanāthaṁ birudaṁ . sogaīsuva rūpaguṇadiṁ miguva parākrama
tējadiṁ sādēvaṁ pogaḷe jagavoldu taṁniṁdagelada siri nelasa taddavāḍiyanāḷdaṁ . Ā daṁḍādhipana kiṟiyayyaṁ siṣṭabhaṭṭaneṁteṁdaḍe . śrīmatu sahavāsāṁbhōjanabhō
maṇi śiṣṭēṣṭavaṁdibriṁdōchsavaciṁtāmaṇi vāchsasyagōtraśirōmaṇiyana śiṣṭabhaṭṭane sedaṁ dhareyoḷu . baḍavaṁgadhamaṁgeḍaṟiṁdaḍapidavarggīva kāva saṁrakṣakaraṁ
paḍedaḷu sutaraṁ sōvale maḍadiyenalu śiṣṭabhaṭṭanaṁtārddhanyaru . vri . vinaya mudāramudughayaṣamuṁnatiyoḷpu negerttevetta peṁpina kaṇi mānavākriti
ya bhārati rūpaviḷāsalakṣmi pāvanamabhimānajāhnaviyenalu negaḷdaḷu nutakīrtti śiṣṭabhaṭṭana sati puṇyaputravatti sōvaladēvi Īḷātaḷāgradoḷu . kaṁda . sarasijagarbbha
na vāṇige hariyesavā sirige harane girijātege tānaraviṁdapriyanaśēsaṁ siri sōvaladēvi yanisi peṁpaṁ taḷedaḷu . Avaribarggudaīsidarssavinayadiṁ tikka
rājadaṁḍādhipanuṁ ravitēja vipuḷaysarenalavarge sutaṁ negaḷdanalte kēśavadēvaṁ . tadagrejaṁ tikkarājaneṁtaṁdaḍe . vritta . malevara gaṁḍa mecadara gaṁḍa toṁḍappavara gaṁ
ḍa darppadoḷgaligaḷa gaṁḍa kūradara gaṁḍa seṇappara gaṁḍa bīradoḷ nalivara gaṁḍa muṁde birudeṁbara gaṁḍa raṇaikagaṁḍa tāṁ chaligaḷagaṁḍa voḍeyara gaṁḍa śrīvikramadēvanurbiyo
ḷu . mattaṁ . kali raṇaraṁgadalli kali bēḷvarabēḷpudanīva cāgadoḷ kalihitadharmmakāri yaṁdaḍeyalu kali dānamahōpakāradalli kali sahadēva niṁnnanujanī kali tikra
maneṁdu nicaluṁ chaladalu baṇnikuṁ negaḷda kēśavanaṇnananī jagajjanaṁ . kaṁda . dikkarigaḷa ka ṭadoḷamā dikkāṁteyareseva varakuceṁgaḷa keladoḷ tikkarasanesanavaṁ birudina vikra
maṁ kīrttilakṣmi bareyutippaḷu . © tadanuja kēśavadēvaneṁteṁdaḍe . © . vritta . kuladeĪva kēśavaṁ kēśavākritinibha sanmaṁtralakṣmi suratunōjvaḷapaṭṭa śiṣṭabhaṭṭaṁprabaḷa
ripugharaṭṭapitaṁ trikramaṁ sadubaḷanaṇnaṁ tānenelu raṁjisuvaneḷege bhāgāṁganāvallabhaṁ sōvaladēvinaṁdana kēśavananupamapuṇyaṁ camūpāgragaṇyaṁ . kaṟeyade toṭṭa dha
rmamanaṟida baḷikkagrahara dēvālayamaṁ neṟe puṇyavenisi māḍalu kaṟevaḍe kēsavane ballanōrbane jagadoḷ . nirbā śrī babulēśvaradoḷoppe kūṭamoṟe dōrbbā
hāmalla sahadēvōrbbīśana taṁmma kēśavaṁ māḍisidaṁ . mattaṁ māḍisidaṁ puru śōttamana varaprasāda kēśāpurada madhyōttuṁgadalu trikūṭamanallamaṁ lakṣmīnṛsiṁha harihara hararaṁ . ka .
Ādityādinavagrahavēdōktada hōmamaṁḍapa dikupālaru nādavida nāradamuni mēdini yoḷu bālyamōyenalu māḍisidanu . mattaṁ dēvatepalamumanuttema sadvijaranu
ttamōttamara seṁpattina nale māḍirisalu mattaṁ kēśavane ballanī jagakellaṁ . vritta . kiriyaṁgaḷāḷda janadesakadoḷu bērppa ranyarppalarumaḷi
piniṁ pūḷdu baitiṭṭa hoṁnna teṟadiṁdaṁ hōgadaṁte nilalaṟiyadenuttarthigaḷigīva mattaṁ neṟe dēvālyagrahāragaḷa kēśavadaṁḍanāthanu . vri . nīḍadaḍe biṭṭa māḍi
dude sāhasavoldu kaḍaṁgi balpiniṁ piḍidu vajraliptikaḍegaṇna nōḍidaḍā rirāyarī sahadēva niṁnenuja kēśava
noḷu salesadudurbiyoḷu . mattaṁ . nuḍidane tāṁbrapatralikhitākṣaravītane biḍidano pratāpayari bhūpacamūparanājiraṁgadoḷu toḍardanu koṁdaneṁ
budidu bhēriya ghōśane niṁnna mecume vārāsi himadviti śiṣṭabhaṭṭana - tanūja sahavāsivaṁ
śatiḷakaṁ mahiyūḷene negaḷdaṁ sumaṁtri kēśavadēvanu . yādavacakra sta bhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha sakaḷalakṣmīvallabha śrī viṣṇu vaṁśō
dubhavaṁ bhāvōdubhavaṁ śrīmadvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ ripurāyamadanamahēśvaraṁ yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāskaraṁ teluṁgarāyaśiraḥkamaḷamūḷōtpāṭanakaraṁ māḷaviya mallana
hitarāyavurasella gūrjaravāraṇāṁkuśaṁ duṣṭarāyagajatībrakaśa horasaṇa diśāpaṭṭa nirmmūḷana nāmādi praśastisahitaṁ śrīmatu pratāpaThis seems to be a mistake forhoysaṇa
cakravartti srī rāyanārāyaṇa siṁhaṇadēvarasaru dēvagiriya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttirdu dakṣiṇadiśāvarada diguvijayōdyōgadi naḍedu
baruttaṁ srī kriṣṇaveṁṇṇā nadītīraṁ bīḍidu bīḍu koṭṭiṁbāgeya hoḷeya kupadalu baṁdalli koṁkaṇa gōveya śrī jayakēsidēvarasara kanyāratuna maīḷalamahādēvi yara taralu
pōpalli śrī siṁhaṇadēvara tatupādapadmōpajīvi samasta rājya]bharenirūpita mahā mātyapadavīvirājamānamānōṁnata prabhumaṁtrōtsāha śaktitrayaśaṁpaṁnanuṁ na
nuṁ karituragapaṭṭasāhaṇapatiyanēkadēśapati rāyadaṁḍanātha dohatthamalla ripuhrideya śaraṇāgata gaṁḍabhēruṁ
ḍa śrī sahadēvadaṁḍanāyakaru taddavāḍi heḍa kaṇaṁbaḍe nāḍugaḷaṁ śrī bhōgēśvarara sakavarśa 1128 neya krōdhana saṁ vāsesō
sūriya grahaṇaviṁtī tithi kūḍeye sahadēvanāyakaru taddavāḍi sāsiradoḷagaṇa baḷiya grāmada prasiddha sīmāsamanvitaca
turāghāṭa nidhi nikṣēpa jaḷa pāśāṇa tarumāḷāsamanvita suṁka sāda baṇṇige svē
tachatra cāmara karuḷa koṁta dhavaḷa śaṁkha bhēriyeṁba paṁcamahāśabda samanvita tāṁbrasāśana śilā siṁhaṇadēva ṇārthaṁ sa
rbanamasyavācaṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁtāgi srī sahadēvadaṁḍanāyakaraṁ bēḍalā taṁma kēśavadēvargge nāyakaru pū
rb�nāmada biḍivesara grāmava kēśāpurivesare māḍi nānāgōtreda sāvāsi dēvara mārkaṁḍē
yapurada dēvaru kēśavāpuradēvaru yelli kuḷadēvariṁtinitakaṁ voṁdubhāga sahitaṁ
dēvarggoṁdu bhāga brāhmaṇarggeraḍu bhāgavāgi tāṁbraśāsana śiḷāśāsana sahita sahitaṁ ya
holadoḷage śrī lakṣmīnarasiṁhadēvargge śrīsādēvēsvare śrīdhara mādhava
ṇṇe dīpāvaḷi sarba basaṁtadōkuḷi caītradavanārōpaṇa vāgi hola matta 11
śrīvikrama . © . vritta . siṁhaṇadēva
rimaṁḍaḷikamauḷivighaṭṭitapādapīṭhana . kaṁda . kaṭṭidude paṭṭa siṁhaṇa vikkarasana
dēvarasana keyyalu kuḷakramāgatadiṁ baṁda nāḍoḷagaṇa taṁba praviṣṭa
vare voṁdu bhāgada holadoḷage śrīlakṣmīnarasiṁhadēvargge sirigāveyalu matta
dhāreya paḍedu
lu A ranigadde Īṁ baḍaga
mūḍa seṭṭikeĪṁ baḍaga nivēśa
mēsvarabhaṭṭara haraḷa visakadiṁ
rkāṁḍēya puradalu
damaged
yereya visakadi
haraḷa visakadi
ḍagalu śrīma
damaged
ma steḷada
naba bhaṭṭa
ya de hoṁna The remaining portion is lost.
Digital edition of SII 15.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
